title: CXXRTL: debug_item is not default-constructible
body:
A natural way to use debug_item from a cxxrtl object would be to have them as global variables or member variables of a class, initialize them at startup/construction then use them.  It's currently impossible because they're not default-constructible and cannot be initialized from a constructor (there's no direct lookup interface in the modules).

So the only viable method for now is to initialize the debug_items variable at startup/construction, be sure not to lose it ever, and lookup pointers to the debug_item members.  Looking up the item in the map at each use would be insane, recreating the debug_items would be insaner.

Being able to just handle them as (kinda-)globals would be a lot nicer.
